age_range.evidence: We conducted a diary study to investigate how teens (N=57, M age = 16.3 years) used Instagram to regulate their emotions.

countries.evidence: reside and attend high school in the United States

fieldwork_year.evidence: We conducted a diary study during July-August 2023 in which teens reported daily on their experiences and emotions on Instagram for approximately seven days

gender_split.evidence: Boys (19.3%), Girls (66.7%), Non-binary or third gender (8.8%), Other (Prefer to self-describe / Prefer not to disclose) (5.3%)

sample_size.evidence: we recruited 70 Instagram users, 57 of whom completed at least four daily surveys
